For the 28 day subs orientation or sales, I would absolutely recommend you refer to the best practices from the other videos put in there by Alex because it's the same concept. A few little things that I would note in the 28 day presentation when you're doing their supplement sale. One, explain to them that the meal plan and the nutrition is for 28 days and because it's a little bit more aggressive, there are certain supplementation protocols they should probably follow now that they may not need as much later on. So for instance, explain to them in 28 days, we're going to challenge you to do things that you probably have never done and your body is going to be sore. And so I absolutely recommend that you have intra and sleep multiplier in your protocol because it's going to help you recover and help you survive this. You can see the results. Two, I would absolutely recommend them take an EFA because they're going to be doing less fats throughout the week. And so the EFA will help them to supplement that. They will get it on their makeup days, but this is a lower fat meal plan. And so the EFA will help kind of counteract a lot of those issues there. And then all of the other stuff that will still go with it, I would definitely recommend a pre-workout one and two because they're going to have a little bit less carbohydrates. They could probably use the extra energy and boost to make them want to be motivated to work out because there's going to be days they don't want to. All the same stuff applies, just taking that 28 day protocol, kind of gearing it specific to that so they feel like you're giving them a prescription as opposed to a generic thing. Also I would recommend explaining to them that still Ship and Save is always going to be the best option for them because they can just cancel it whenever they want. Even though it's a 28 day program and a month's supply would cover them, I would still gear towards hey, here's the cheapest price or this is just what all our clients do as opposed to giving them the option. Again, for the rest of the supplement training, I would definitely refer to the in-depth supplement training that Alex has put together in other sections of this portal and have a fun with your 28 days.
